title: Freshly Roasted Spanish Vegetable Skillet
description: A hearty and flavorful Valencian-inspired dish featuring roasted vegetables cooked to perfection on a tava griddle, perfect for a lazy Sunday meal. This low-carb friendly recipe is a great option for those looking for a healthy and satisfying meal.
instructions: Preheat the tava griddle over medium heat.
In a large bowl, toss the sliced eggplant, zucchini, red bell pepper, and onion with 2 tablespoons of olive oil, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Arrange the vegetables on the preheated tava griddle in a single layer, working in batches if necessary.
Roast the vegetables for 20-25 minutes, flipping them halfway through, until they are tender and lightly browned.
In a small bowl, mix together the minced garlic and smoked paprika.
Add the garlic and smoked paprika mixture to the roasted vegetables and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the vegetables for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve the roasted vegetable skillet hot, garnished with fresh parsley or thyme if desired.
